dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires observation period > 40 days (enforced at backtest engine level, not in JSON rules). Used Donchian breakouts (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for N-day breakout methodology. Price position indicator (price_pos_20) captures retracement levels mentioned in source (1-6% retracements). Entry conditions detect breakaway gap continuation. Exit on moving average crossover represents reasonable reversal condition per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. Context-dependent direction allows both long and short entries based on breakout direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires observation period > 40 days (enforced at backtest engine level, not in JSON rules). Used Donchian breakouts (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for N-day breakout methodology. Price position indicator (price_pos_20) captures retracement levels mentioned in source (1-6% retracements). Entry conditions detect breakaway gap continuation. Exit on moving average crossover represents reasonable reversal condition per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. Context-dependent direction allows both long and short entries based on breakout direction.

source_rule_text: Use N-day breakout, swing trading, or pivot point breakout strategies when the observation period is greater than 40 days to take advantage of breakaway gaps that continue trend direction.
